filesCreated.purpose: Frontend JS — ResizeObserver caps .top-gradient max-height to <main> element height, scoped to .event-hero wrappers only

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in EventHero.tsx and other blocks — not introduced by this change

syncStatus.notes: No TSX or PHP changes were required. The htmlStructureSync warning (root wrapper mismatch) is a pre-existing false positive caused by the validator seeing <InspectorControls> before <section> in the TSX — standard Gutenberg pattern.

testPage.notes: Test page already existed with 5 block variations. No changes needed.

output.implementationNotes: Created EventHero.js following the Hero.js pattern exactly. The only change from Hero.js is that querySelectorAll targets '.event-hero .top-gradient' instead of '.top-gradient', scoping the ResizeObserver logic to EventHero instances only. The file is auto-bundled into screen.js via the webpack glob pattern './blocks/**/!(*index).js' — no block.json viewScript registration needed.
